name: Kamen Rider Gaim
overview: Kouta Kazuraba works hard as a part-timer and he thinks that he would like to be a different person in the future. One day, he happened to pick up a Sengoku Driver, the tool for transforming into an Armored Rider, in the forest and started fighting as Armored Rider Gaim to save the people from the monsters named Inves, who came from a different world.

trailers.title: Opening | Just Live More - Gaim no Kaze (Shonan no Kaze) [Subtitled]
